summary: Backend testing of report generation and AI features completed. All 17 tests passed (100%). Report generation for all 3 types (quick_summary, full_detailed, extensive_log) works correctly. Get reports list endpoint functional. Auto-identify grounds endpoint working properly. Using real OpenAI GPT-4o via Emergent LLM Key (NOT mocked).
passed_tests: API Health Check (/api/health) - Returns 200 with healthy status
API Root Endpoint (/api/) - Returns 200 with Justitia AI message
Auth Me with Valid Token - Returns 200 with user info
Auth Me without Token - Returns 401 unauthorized
Generate Quick Summary Report - Creates report successfully (~1.7KB analysis)
Generate Full Detailed Report - Creates report successfully (~4KB analysis)
Generate Extensive Log Report - Creates report successfully (~3KB analysis)
Generate Report Invalid Type - Returns 400 with error message
Generate Report Unauthorized - Returns 401 without token
Get Reports List - Returns list of all reports for case
Get Reports Unauthorized - Returns 401 without token
Get Reports Invalid Case - Handled correctly (empty list or 404)
Auto-Identify Grounds - AI analysis identifies grounds from documents
Auto-Identify Invalid Case - Returns 404 for non-existent case
Verify Existing Reports - Confirmed 3 report types exist for test case
Cleanup Test Case - Test data properly cleaned up

report_quick_summary.details: Quick Summary reports generate successfully with ~1.7KB AI-generated analysis

report_full_detailed.details: Full Detailed reports generate successfully with ~4KB AI-generated legal analysis

report_extensive_log.details: Extensive Log reports generate successfully with ~3KB comprehensive analysis

get_reports_list.details: GET /api/cases/{case_id}/reports returns list of all generated reports with proper structure

auto_identify_grounds.details: POST /api/cases/{case_id}/grounds/auto-identify uses GPT-4o to identify potential appeal grounds from documents

api_health_check.details: Both /api/health and /health endpoints return healthy status

critical_code_review_comments: Report generation has proper retry logic with exponential backoff (4 attempts, 3/6/12 second delays) for handling transient OpenAI API errors
AI features use real GPT-4o via Emergent LLM Key - NOT mocked
Document content is properly included in AI prompts with character limits per report type (quick_summary: 2000, others: 3000)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_report_generation.py - Created new focused test file for report generation and AI features
seed_data_creation: Used existing test case 'Josh' (case_cec9b5706fae) with 4 documents. Test created additional test case for report generation verification which was cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All report generation types (quick_summary, full_detailed, extensive_log) confirmed working. Auto-identify grounds working. Test session token still valid. The test case case_cec9b5706fae has 4 PDF documents (no extracted text) and 3 generated reports. Case case_8870f81e38a9 has 12 documents and 7 identified grounds - good for testing AI features.
